Source space region clustering¶

This module may be employed to cluster source areas into distinct regions.

source_reconstruction.source_region_model.apply_source_region_model(fs_avg_src_data, src_fs_avg_valid_lh_vert, src_fs_avg_valid_rh_vert, model_vert, model_faces, fs_avg_path)¶

Averages activity from individual areas in source space to parcellation of the Desikan-Killiany cortical atlas.

Parameters:

  • fs_avg_src_data – Data in fs average source space.

  • src_fs_avg_valid_lh_vert – List of left hemisphere valid/supporting vertices in fs average space.

  • src_fs_avg_valid_rh_vert – List of right hemisphere valid/supporting vertices in fs average space.

  • model_vert – Model vertices.

  • model – Model faces.

  • fs_avg_path – Path to fs average’s freesurfer files.

Returns:

(morphed_epoch_data, morphed_epoch_channels, morphed_region_names) - Data, src space vertices’ ids, and channel names.

source_reconstruction.source_region_model._read_freesurfer_annotation(path)¶
source_reconstruction.source_region_model._get_sphere_faces(fs_avg_path, hemisphere, model_vert, model_faces)¶
source_reconstruction.source_region_model._get_mri_to_model_trans(mri_neigh_faces)¶
